name: python3-ulid
title: python3-ulid
summary: Universally unique lexicographically sortable identifier (Python library)
description:
Universally unique lexicographically sortable identifier (Python library)
A ULID is a Universally Unique Lexicographically sortable
Identifier. It is:
.
* 128-bit compatible with ``UUID``
* 1.21e+24 unique ULIDs per millisecond
* Lexicographically sortable!
* Canonically encoded as a 26 character string, as opposed to the 36
character UUID
* Uses Crockford's base32 for better efficiency and readability (5
bits per character)
* Case insensitive
* No special characters (URL safe)

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for python-ulid.
arguments.raw: -ulid  Option present in package usage line for python-ulid.

When you need a concrete invocation, run `python-ulid [options] [args]` as documented upstream for python-ulid.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python-ulid with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python-ulid --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
